arts.ttl: Rangers 'mind games' denied by Jim Goodwin as Dundee Utd boss puts Ian McCall right over his Ibrox tactics
arts.sum: Goodwin says there were no dark arts at play and he was simply stating the obvious

arts.ttl: John McGinn hit by grim Rangers warning sign every time he watches them
arts.sum: McGinn reckons the empty seats at Ibrox are a sign of the grim times the club are going through
